name: ChatGPT
tagline: The world's leading language model by OpenAI.
description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered language model developed by OpenAI, capable of generating human-like text based on the input it receives. It is used for a wide range of applications including coding assistance, content creation, and general inquiry.

name: Midjourney
tagline: Create stunning generative art from text prompts.
description: Midjourney is a research lab and an AI program that generates images from natural language descriptions, similar to DALL-E and Stable Diffusion. It's known for its high artistic quality.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: GitHub Copilot uses the OpenAI Codex to suggest code and entire functions in real-time, right from your editor.
features: Works in VS Code, Neovim, and JetBrains
